meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no marketing skills (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no marketing skills. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Solve Marketing Gaps for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no marketing skills' hurdle as a freelancer. Master the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate client acquisition and delivery.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template bridges the marketing gap by automating high-converting landing pages and lead magnets directly from your codebase. By integrating Claude Code, you transform raw technical specs into persuasive marketing assets in minutes, allowing you to focus on engineering while the system handles the client-facing narrative.
content.intro:
You are staring at a blank screen, the code is pristine, the architecture is bulletproof, yet the client acquisition pipeline is bone dry. For the high-level engineer, the chasm between 'build it and they will come' and actual revenue is where most freelance careers go to die. You don't need a marketing degree; you need an automated engine that treats marketing as a deployment cycle.

Introducing the Antigravity project template—a systematic framework designed to turn technical utility into commercial value. By pairing this with Claude Code, you stop guessing what works and start shipping assets that convert. It is time to treat your marketing stack with the same rigor you apply to your production infrastructure.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Configure your project scaffolding to separate core logic from marketing-ready meta-layers, ensuring your repo is ready for automated content injection.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project scaffold using the Antigravity template, ensuring the 'marketing-meta' directory is configured for automatic SEO extraction.

steps.title: Map Technical Features to Value Propositions
steps.description: Use Claude Code to parse your codebase and generate marketing copy that speaks to client pain points rather than just technical specs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan the current codebase and map every functional module to a specific business outcome or pain point for a non-technical stakeholder.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Analyze my current components and generate 3 persuasive value-prop headlines for each.'

steps.title: Automate Landing Page Generation
steps.description: Inject your extracted value propositions into the Antigravity landing page template to create high-converting assets instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a landing page template using the mapped value propositions, ensuring optimized H1s, H2s, and a clear call-to-action section.

steps.title: Integrate SEO Meta-Layering
steps.description: Apply automated schema markup and metadata generation to ensure your project templates rank effectively without manual intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement JSON-LD schema markup and meta-description generation based on the current project's core functionality and target keywords.

steps.title: Deploy the Lead Capture Pipeline
steps.description: Hook your generated landing page into a lightweight CRM or webhook to ensure your marketing efforts result in actionable client leads.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the lead capture form to trigger a webhook notification to my Slack channel and sync data with my CRM provider.

pro_tips: Treat your marketing copy as a version-controlled asset; never manually edit text, always update the source JSON in your Antigravity config.
Use Claude Code to run periodic 'competitor analysis' scans on your own landing pages to identify gaps in your messaging.
Automate the generation of 'case study' snippets by pointing Claude Code at your git commit history to extract high-impact feature releases.
Implement a 'dark mode' toggle for your marketing pages via the Antigravity template to instantly improve professional perception.
Always run a final 'conversion audit' via Claude Code before deployment to ensure your CTA-to-value-prop ratio is balanced.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, iterate by using the 'A/B testing' module within the Antigravity framework to refine your copy based on real-world traffic patterns.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your technical genius go unnoticed. Systematize your growth, automate your marketing, and start closing high-ticket clients with the same speed you write code. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
